task_description: Integrate SPPD with Izin Dinas Luar using grade-based benefit calculation, and display grade-tailored peraturan/prosedur in the SPPD module and employee portal

verification.summary: All 3 JS files pass node --check syntax validation. No test framework exists in this project - verification limited to syntax checks. Semantic review v1 identified 7 issues; 5 most important were fixed in a follow-up commit.
